name: deep_archive
question: According to the town archives, what major infrastructure changes did the town make, and what prompted each of them?
gold_facts: The harbormaster's ledger records that the deep-water quay was rebuilt on oak pilings after the great storm season destroyed the original timber framework.
The grain mill converted from waterwheel to turbine drive in a single winter, doubling its throughput while halving the toll charged to upland farmers.
The observatory's principal telescope lost three nights of observation each month to lamplight from the new quarter until the council ordered shielded street lanterns.
